section.p: # source_id: joget # title: Joget # source_url: https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&prop=extracts&explaintext=1&format=json&titles=Joget # license: CC BY-SA 4.0 # attribution: Wikipedia co

figure.name: Ingested Figure

step.action: Joget (Jawi: جوڬيت) is a traditional Malay dance

figure.step: Joget (Jawi: جوڬيت) is a traditional Malay dance that originated in Malacca in the colonial era.

step.action: It was influenced by the Portuguese dance of Bra

figure.step: It was influenced by the Portuguese dance of Branyo which is believed to have been spread to Malacca during the spice trade.

step.action: In Malacca, joget dance is better known as Chaku

figure.step: In Malacca, joget dance is better known as Chakunchak.

step.action: The dance is one of the most popular folk dances

figure.step: The dance is one of the most popular folk dances in Malaysia that is normally performed by couples in cultural festivals, weddings and other social functions.

step.action: The dance is of the Portuguese roots and is acco

figure.step: The dance is of the Portuguese roots and is accompanied by an ensemble consisting of a violin of Western world, a knobbed gong of Asia, a flute (optional), and at least two rebana or gendang of Maritime Southeast Asia.

step.action: The tempo of Joget music is fairly quick, with a

figure.step: The tempo of Joget music is fairly quick, with a feeling of teasing and playing between the partners.

step.action: The music emphasizes duple- and triple-beat divi

figure.step: The music emphasizes duple- and triple-beat division, both in alternation and simultaneously, and is sung in the northeast Malaysian style.

step.action: One of the most popular types of Joget is called

figure.step: One of the most popular types of Joget is called "Joget Lambak" which is usually performed by a large crowd together at social functions.

step.action: In Indonesia, the term 'joget' is usually applie

figure.step: In Indonesia, the term 'joget' is usually applied to any form of popular street dance, such as that to dangdut music.

step.action: Joget, an open source workflow software built in

figure.step: Joget, an open source workflow software built in Malaysia, is named after this dance.

step.action: Joget gained popularity among the Malay communit

figure.step: Joget gained popularity among the Malay community in Singapore after its introduction in 1942.

step.action: Sri Lankan Kaffiringna music style and Joget has

figure.step: Sri Lankan Kaffiringna music style and Joget has some related melodic variations.

step.action: Both styles have a Portuguese influence, accordi

figure.step: Both styles have a Portuguese influence, according to Sri Lankan musicologist Ruwin Dias.
